pageContext.name: Sonya Blade
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Sonya Blade!   From the classic fighting game Mortal Kombat, this Sonya Blade Art Scale Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Mortal Kombat collectible.  Mortal Kombat fans, don't miss your chance to add this Sonya Blade figure to your Mortal Kombat collection!
